hero.lede: Slow, deliberate skincare sourced from the finest Korean houses. Formulated for sensitive skin, designed for daily skincare routine.

section.bestsellers_lede: Three quiet heroes, worn in the pockets of everyday skin.
section.ritual_lede: Four steps, morning and evening — sourced by us, chosen by you.
section.testimonials_lede: Letters from the people who quietly wear our skincare routines every day.
section.journal_lede: Notes on ingredients, seasons, and the Korean idea of a skincare routine.
section.newsletter_lede: New arrivals, ingredient deep-dives, and quiet thoughts. Unsubscribe any time.

ingredients.meta_description: Every active we formulate with — alphabetised, translated, with the products they live in. Browse by key asset or search the full INCI list.
ingredients.title: What's in the jar, explained.
ingredients.lede: We believe you should know exactly what's touching your skin. Every ingredient we use is listed here with its INCI name, how it works, and which products contain it.
ingredients.filter_empty: No ingredients start with this letter.
ingredients.product_count: {count, plural, =0 {not yet in any product} one {# product} other {# products}}
ingredients.no_description: A full profile of this ingredient is on the way.
ingredients.no_products: Not currently in any published product.
ingredients.empty_body: We're preparing the full ingredient index now. Every active we formulate with will have its own profile here — including how it works and which products contain it.

rituals.meta_description: A four-step Korean skincare routine — cleanse, treat, moisturise, protect. Considered products, quiet routine, visible results.
rituals.title: Four steps, quietly repeated.
rituals.lede: Korean skincare is a practice, not a purchase. The skincare routine is short on purpose — four considered moments, morning and night, that compound over weeks into skin that feels more itself.
rituals.product_count: {count, plural, =0 {Curating soon} one {# product} other {# products}}

cleanse.body: A gentle first pass to lift the day — SPF, pollution, a little skin oil — without stripping the barrier. Lukewarm water, thirty seconds, no rush.

treat.body: The step that does the heavy lifting. A serum or essence chosen for what your skin is asking for right now: hydration, calm, brightening, or barrier repair.

moisturise.body: Seal the treat step in. A moisturiser that suits your skin's current mood — lighter in summer, richer through winter — locks water in and holds the routine together.

protect.body: Mornings only. A broad-spectrum SPF is the single most effective anti-ageing step we know of. Everything above rests on this.

rituals.closing_title: Let us build the skincare routine with you.
rituals.closing_body: A four-question skin quiz narrows the choices down to a routine that actually fits your skin — plus a few editor's notes on why each product was picked.

quizPage.meta_description: Seven quick questions and we'll compose a Korean skincare skincare routine matched to your skin, ingredient by ingredient.
quizPage.title: A few quiet questions about your skin.
quizPage.lede: Tell us how it behaves and what you'd like to change. We'll match you to a routine — every product picked by the ingredients on its label.
quizPage.registered_notice: To unlock your {percent}% discount on the recommended skincare routine, please register first. The reward is reserved per account, so guests can't claim it.

privacy.meta_title: Your data & privacy — Asian Beauty Shop
privacy.title: Your data, your choice
privacy.lede: You own everything we hold on you. Download a copy of your data whenever you like, and delete your account if you'd rather we forget.
privacy.banner_scheduled_body: Unless you cancel, your personal data will be erased on {date}. You can sign back in any time before then to keep your account.
privacy.cancelled_notice: Your deletion request has been cancelled.
privacy.export_lede: A JSON archive of every record we hold on you — useful for moving to another service or for keeping a personal copy.
privacy.export_format_hint: Opens any time — no queue, no waiting.
privacy.delete_lede: We'll flag your account for deletion immediately, sign you out, and permanently anonymise your personal data after {days} days. Within that window you can sign back in to cancel the request.
privacy.delete_keeps_orders: For tax and accounting reasons we keep anonymised invoices for the period required by Belgian law — your name, e-mail, phone, and address are removed from them.
privacy.delete_confirm_hint: This is a small safeguard against accidental taps.
privacy.delete_error_confirm: Please type DELETE (in uppercase) to confirm.
privacy.delete_error_server: We couldn't schedule the deletion. Please try again in a moment.
privacy.more_body: If you'd like us to correct data, stop processing it for a specific purpose, or you have any other privacy question, write to info@kelmusgroup.eu and we'll handle it within one business day.

returns.title: Your returns
returns.lede: A record of every return request you've sent us — from the moment it arrives in our inbox to the refund landing back on your card.
returns.empty_body: If a product didn't suit you, open the relevant order and tap "Request a return" — we'll take it from there.
returns.form_meta_title: Request a return — Asian Beauty Shop
returns.form_lede: Tell us which items you'd like to return and why. We read every request by hand and reply within one business day.
returns.form_items_hint: Use the + and − buttons to choose how many of each you'd like to return.
returns.form_details_placeholder: If there's anything we should know — a batch issue, damage on arrival, how your skin reacted — please share it here.
returns.form_details_hint: Up to 2 000 characters. We'll reply to the email on your account.
returns.form_summary: {count, plural, =0 {No items selected yet} one {# item selected} other {# items selected}}

form_error.invalid_order: We couldn't find that order on your account.
form_error.no_items: Please select at least one item to return.
form_error.server_error: Something went wrong on our side — please try again in a moment.
form_error.order_not_returnable: This order isn't eligible for a return yet.

returns.detail_cancel_hint: Changed your mind? You can cancel this request until we approve it.
returns.timeline_step_requested_body: We've received your request and our team is reviewing it now.
returns.timeline_step_approved_body: Your return has been approved. Send the items back to us using the instructions below.
returns.timeline_step_received_body: Your parcel has arrived at our warehouse. We're inspecting the items.
returns.timeline_step_refunded_body: The refund is on its way back to your original payment method — typically 1–3 business days.
returns.timeline_label_hint: Stick the label on your parcel and drop it at any pickup point listed on the label.
returns.timeline_rejected_body: After review we weren't able to accept this return. If you have questions, reply to the email we sent — we read every response.
returns.timeline_cancelled_body: You cancelled this return request. If you change your mind, you can submit a new one from the order page while it's still within our return window.

home.title: Asian Beauty Shop — Asian beauty, considered.
home.description: Curated Korean skincare from the finest houses. Formulated for sensitive skin, designed for daily skincare routine.

search.ritual_cleanse_body: Low-pH milks and waters for the morning basin.
search.ritual_moisturise_body: Hydrating creams and balms for lasting comfort.
search.ritual_protect_body: Daily SPF and barrier care to seal the skincare routine.

journal.title: Notes, from the studio.
journal.lede: Ingredient studies, skincare routine notes, and quiet thoughts on Korean skincare. Written slowly, published when it feels finished.
journal.empty_title: The first letter is almost ready.
journal.empty_body: We're gathering the opening essays — one on ginseng, one on the Joseon moon jar, and a third on the first gesture of the morning. They'll appear here when they're ready to be read.
journal.meta_description: Ingredient studies, skincare routine notes, and quiet thoughts on Korean skincare.

contact.meta_description: Questions about your order, returns, wholesale or a product? Write to us — we read every message personally.
contact.title: Write to us.
contact.lede: Real people, one small studio. We read every message and usually reply within two working days.
contact.response_body: We aim to reply within two working days. For order questions, please include your order number (it starts with ABS-) so we can pull up your skincare routine straight away.
contact.message_placeholder: Tell us a little about what you're after — your skin story, a product question, anything at all.
contact.consent_label: I understand my message is stored so we can reply. Read the <link>privacy policy</link>.
contact.sent_body: We've got your note and will reply to {email} within two working days. Meanwhile, the shop is open.
contact.error_name_too_short: Please enter your name (at least 2 characters).
contact.error_name_too_long: That name is a bit too long — 80 characters max.
contact.error_email_invalid: That email doesn't look quite right. Please check it.
contact.error_phone_too_long: That phone number is too long.
contact.error_message_too_short: Please write a few more words (at least 10 characters) so we can help.
contact.error_message_too_long: That message is too long — 4 000 characters max.
contact.error_consent_required: Please tick the box to let us store your message.
contact.error_generic: Something didn't go through. Please check the highlighted fields.

checkout.disclaimer_guest_heading: Sign in to keep the change.
checkout.disclaimer_guest_body: Gift cards are linked to the email they were sent to. If you check out as a guest and don't use the full balance, you'll need the original email to redeem the rest later. Sign in or create an account first to keep any leftover automatically.
